questions.title: Given a 2D integer array mat[][] and a number x, find whether element x is present in the matrix or not.
questions.explanation: Traverse each row and column using nested loops and check if x exists.

questions.title: Given an array arr, rotate the array by one position in clockwise direction.
questions.explanation: Move last element to front and shift remaining elements right.

questions.title: Given an array arr[]. Your task is to find the minimum and maximum elements in the array.
questions.explanation: Traverse array and track minimum and maximum values.

questions.title: You are given an array arr(0-based index) and two positive integer index and val. You need to insert an val at given index.
questions.explanation: Shift elements right and insert value.

questions.title: Given an array arr of integers and an index key(0-based index). Your task is to return the element present at the index key in the array.
questions.explanation: Directly return arr[key].

questions.title: Given two arrays a[] and b[], your task is to determine whether b[] is a subset of a[].
questions.explanation: All elements of b must exist in a.

questions.title: Given an integer year. Print "True" (without quotes) if it can represent a leap year, otherwise print "False" (without quotes).
questions.explanation: Leap year divisible by 4 but not 100 unless divisible by 400.

questions.title: Given an array arr[], print all its elements space-separated.
questions.explanation: Traverse array and print each element.

questions.title: Given an array arr of distinct elements, return an array of all elements except the two greatest elements in sorted order.
questions.explanation: Sort array and remove last two elements.

questions.title: Given two arrays of arr1 and arr2, calculate the product of the maximum element of arr1 and minimum element of arr2.
questions.explanation: Find max of arr1 and min of arr2.

questions.title: Count elements less than or equal and greater than or equal to target.
questions.explanation: Count elements based on conditions.

questions.title: Split array into two halves and return product of their sums.
questions.explanation: Divide array into halves and multiply sums.

questions.title: Find index of element or return -1 if not found.
questions.explanation: Search element using loop.

questions.title: Find indices where value equals index (1-based indexing).
questions.explanation: Check if arr[i] == i+1.

questions.title: Find last index of '1' in a binary string.
questions.explanation: Traverse string from right.

questions.title: Sort all elements of an NxN matrix.
questions.explanation: Flatten, sort and refill.

questions.title: Count substrings that start and end with 1.
questions.explanation: Count combinations of 1s.

questions.title: Count uppercase characters in a string.
questions.explanation: Check ASCII range of uppercase letters.

questions.title: Print decreasing pattern of string.
example:
Input: Geek → Output:
Geek
Gee
Ge
G
questions.explanation: Print substring reducing one char each time.

questions.title: Find maximum extra amount by replacing 6 with 9.
questions.explanation: Replace digits and compute difference.

questions.title: Find LCM and GCD of two numbers.
questions.explanation: Use Euclid algorithm.

questions.title: Find median of array.
questions.explanation: Sort and find middle element.

questions.title: Round number to nearest multiple of 10.
questions.explanation: Apply rounding rules.

questions.title: Divide elements into parts <= k and count total parts.
questions.explanation: Divide each element and count parts.

questions.title: Check if digits can form a number divisible by 3.
questions.explanation: Check sum of digits divisible by 3.

questions.title: Count cells in matrix where i+j equals given value.
questions.explanation: Traverse matrix and count satisfying cells.

questions.title: Find digital root of number.
questions.explanation: Keep summing digits until one digit.

questions.title: Find number of factors of N factorial.
questions.explanation: Find factorial and count its factors.

questions.title: Generate multiplication table of given number.
questions.explanation: Multiply number from 1 to 10.

questions.title: Return numbers whose digits are only 1, 2, or 3.
questions.explanation: Check digits of each number.
